name: Mikayla Table Lamp - 16.25 Inch Height - TBL4527 - Natural - Safavieh
description:
Illuminate your space with the natural charm of the Mikayla Table Lamp. Crafted with a skillfully woven rattan body and shade, this lamp brings an element of organic aesthetics to any room. Its neutral color palette ensures it complements a variety of decor styles with ease.

Dimensions carefully measured to fit your space, the Mikayla Table Lamp stands at 16.25 inches in height with a 10.25-inch diameter shade, and a stable 4.375-inch base. With a 60-inch cord, it offers flexibility in placement and ease of use.

Add a touch of warmth and serene ambiance to your living room, bedroom, or office with this tastefully designed table lamp. The Mikayla Table Lamp marries the artistry of natural materials with functional lighting, making it a delightful addition to your home furnishings.
